headline: AT&T Stock’s Bad Week Just Keeps Getting Worse
summary: AT&T stock and Verizon Communications are falling once more. Both stocks have lost billions of dollars in market value this week on concerns around Elon Musk’s SpaceX potentially launching a mobile phone.

headline: Comcast Spinoff Could Rejuvenate Its Depressed Stock
summary: Possible deals include a merger of Comcast with Charter Communications, the No. 2 cable and broadband company, or an NBC Universal deal with Netflix.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock to Keep an Eye On and 2 We Turn Down
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is home to the biggest and most well-known companies in the market, making it a go-to index for investors seeking stability. But not all large-cap stocks are created equal - some are struggling with slowing growth, declining margins, or increased competition.
